data.name: Hentai Clicker: Davinya is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Davinya is streaming

Step into a world of calm breathing, deep stretches… and dangerously naughty temptation.
Davinya, your seductive yoga instructor with a flawless body and a playful smile, is live and ready to guide you through a “session” you won’t forget. Every click makes her pose deeper, blush harder, and tease you with her flexible, shameless confidence.

She’s not here for peaceful meditation… she’s here to make you lose focus. 🧘‍♀️🔥

🧘‍♀️ About the Game

Hentai Clicker: Davinya is streaming blends addictive clicker gameplay with a spicy yoga fantasy.
Each tap builds your progress and unlocks new stages where Davinya shows off her best poses, her hottest outfits, and her most mischievous reactions.

Collect hearts to unlock stylish yoga looks, steamy animations, and flirty voice lines that make every session feel more intense. Upgrade your skills, stack hearts faster, and discover how far Davinya is willing to stretch… just for you. 😏

🎉 Features

🧘‍♀️ Naughty Yoga Fantasy – A playful instructor who loves teasing her students.
🎨 Sexy Anime Visuals – Smooth, vibrant art with a seductive vibe.
🖱️ Addictive Clicker Gameplay – Simple to play, impossible to stop.
💗 Unlockable Outfits – From cute yoga sets to bold, daring looks.
🔊 Voice Acting & Reactions – Sweet whispers, playful laughs, and flirty teasing.
🚀 Progression & Upgrades – Stack hearts, level up, and unlock new sessions.

💖 Why You’ll Love It

If you love confident girls, playful teasing, and a seductive “fitness” vibe, Davinya is your perfect obsession.
She’s flexible, fearless, and always in control… until you make her lose it with every click. 🔥

🎮 How to Play

🖱️ Click to Collect Hearts – Every tap keeps Davinya focused on you.
🔓 Unlock Outfits & Scenes – Spend hearts to reveal new poses and moments.
💥 Upgrade Skills – Speed up your progress and intensify the session.

🎉 Start Your Naughty Yoga Session!

Ready to breathe in… and give in? 😈
Jump into Hentai Clicker: Davinya is streaming and let your hottest workout begin. 🧘‍♀️💜

data.short_description: 🧘‍♀️🔥 Step into Hentai Clicker: Davinya is streaming! Click to collect ❤️, unlock sexy yoga outfits, and upgrade your skills in this addictive clicker game. Enjoy bold anime visuals, flirty voice acting, and a naughty instructor who loves to tease 😏
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 韓文, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 4000
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon R9 M370X
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
